category_sources: source_facts.description says shpotify is a command-line interface for Spotify on a Mac.
source_facts.executables lists spotify as the installed command.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and GitHub repository use the shpotify project name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides usage documentation for the Spotify CLI.
source_facts.homepage is the official project page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/hnarayanan/shpotify; per instructions repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository describes shpotify as a command-line interface to Spotify.
source_facts.description identifies a Mac command-line interface for Spotify.
